narrative:
Portage County has 106,745 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.4% of registrants.
